524 S Guadalupe Ave, Redondo Beach, CA 90277, USA

An edible cactus fruit, resembles dragon fruit. Skin is soft pink. Inner fruit is white with black seeds and has a pleasant, creamy taste. Harvest before the birds do. May need to check with property owner. Falling Fruit season: December-March.
1111 S Juanita Ave, Redondo Beach, CA 90277, USA
I found a Hottentot-fig here. The flowers were few. Access: Public.
629 S Irena Ave, Redondo Beach, CA 90277, USA
Large fig tree, plenty of fruit. Get the fruit before the birds do! Some neighborhood harvesters visit regularly during the season. Falling Fruit season: August-October.
